description: Design system overhaul: replace indigo/gradient aesthetic with Anthropic's official brand palette (warm ivory, clay orange, editorial typography). Foundation layer that all page-level redesigns depend on.

userStories.title: Replace color palette with Anthropic brand tones
userStories.description: Overhaul tailwind.config.js to replace the indigo/violet brand palette and cool slate grays with Anthropic's official brand colors. New palette mapping: brand-500 becomes #d97757 (orange accent), brand-600 becomes #c4673a (hover/pressed). Replace all gray/slate aliases with warm grays: gray-50 #faf9f5 (light bg), gray-100 #f5f0e8, gray-200 #e8e6dc (light gray), gray-300 #d4ccbd, gray-400 #b0aea5 (mid gray), gray-500 #6b5f4e, gray-600 #4a4139, gray-700 #332d26, gray-800 #1f1b17, gray-900 #141413 (dark/primary text). Add accent-blue #6a9bcc and accent-green #788c5d as secondary/tertiary accents. Add semantic tokens: surface-primary #ffffff, surface-secondary #faf9f5, surface-tertiary #e8e6dc, border-default rgba(120,100,75,0.12), border-strong rgba(120,100,75,0.24). Dark mode: bg #141413, surface #1c1c1a, accent #d97757, text #e8e4de, text-secondary #b0aea5, border rgba(255,255,255,0.08). Remove indigo/violet colors entirely. Remove glow shadow.
acceptanceCriteria: tailwind.config.js brand-* keys map to #d97757/#c4673a shades, not indigo
All gray-* aliases use warm-undertone hex values from the Anthropic palette
accent-blue (#6a9bcc) and accent-green (#788c5d) added as secondary colors
Semantic surface/border tokens added under theme.extend.colors
Dark mode colors defined with #141413 base
No indigo, violet, or cool blue-gray hex values remain in tailwind.config.js
npm run build succeeds with no errors
userStories.notes: Foundation — must land first. Every other story depends on these tokens. Colors are from Anthropic's official brand guidelines.

userStories.title: Update typography to Poppins headings and Lora body
userStories.description: In tailwind.config.js, update fontFamily: fontFamily.sans (body text) becomes ['Lora', 'Georgia', 'serif']. Add fontFamily.display (headings) as ['Poppins', 'Arial', 'sans-serif']. In index.css @layer base, add @import for Google Fonts Poppins (400,500,600,700) and Lora (400,400i,500,600,700). Set base body styles: font-family Lora, font-size 15px, line-height 1.65, letter-spacing -0.01em, color #141413, antialiased. Add utility class .font-display that applies Poppins. All h1-h6 elements should use font-display (Poppins) with: h1 font-semibold text-2xl tracking-tight (-0.02em), h2 font-semibold text-xl tracking-tight, h3 font-medium text-lg. Remove any hardcoded text-slate-* or text-indigo-* color classes from base styles.
acceptanceCriteria: tailwind.config.js fontFamily.sans is Lora with Georgia fallback
tailwind.config.js fontFamily.display is Poppins with Arial fallback
Google Fonts import for Poppins and Lora added to index.css or index.html
Body text uses Lora, headings use Poppins
Base body has line-height 1.65 and letter-spacing -0.01em
No text-slate-* or text-indigo-* in index.css base layer
npm run build succeeds
userStories.notes: Foundation — Poppins + Lora is Anthropic's official font pairing. Serif body text is the key differentiator from generic SaaS.

userStories.title: Redesign button tokens — solid clay, no gradients
userStories.description: Replace all button token strings in frontend/src/lib/designTokens.js. BUTTON_PRIMARY: remove all gradient classes (from-brand-600 to-brand-500, hover:from-brand-700 hover:to-brand-600), replace with bg-brand-500 hover:bg-brand-600 text-white font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-display transition-colors duration-150. BUTTON_SECONDARY: bg-white border border-border-default hover:border-border-strong text-gray-700 hover:text-gray-900 font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-display transition-colors. BUTTON_GHOST: bg-transparent text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700 hover:bg-surface-secondary rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm transition-colors. BUTTON_DANGER: bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-display transition-colors. Remove active:scale-[0.98] from all buttons. Remove all gradient references. Border radius is rounded-md (6px).
acceptanceCriteria: BUTTON_PRIMARY uses solid bg-brand-500, no gradient classes
BUTTON_SECONDARY uses border-border-default token
All buttons use font-display (Poppins) for button text
No active:scale-* transform classes on any button token
No from-*, to-*, bg-gradient-* classes in any button token
All buttons use rounded-md (6px radius)
npm run build succeeds
userStories.notes: High impact — buttons appear on every page. Gradient removal is the single biggest visual shift.

userStories.title: Redesign card and modal tokens — border over shadow
userStories.description: Update CARD_BASE in designTokens.js: replace shadow-card with border border-border-default, use bg-white rounded-xl (12px). Remove shadow-card-hover from CARD_HOVER and replace with border-border-strong transition-colors. MODAL_CARD: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-border-default shadow-lg. MODAL_BACKDROP: bg-black/30 backdrop-blur-sm (reduce from /40). Cards feel border-defined, not shadow-defined — matching Anthropic's flat warm style.
acceptanceCriteria: CARD_BASE uses border-border-default instead of shadow-card
CARD_HOVER uses border-border-strong, no shadow-card-hover
MODAL_CARD keeps shadow-lg but adds border-border-default
MODAL_BACKDROP uses bg-black/30
npm run build succeeds
userStories.notes: Cards are the primary content container. Border > shadow is the core Anthropic visual shift.

userStories.title: Redesign input and form tokens for warm palette
userStories.description: Update INPUT_BASE in designTokens.js: border-gray-300 rounded-md bg-white text-gray-900 placeholder:text-gray-400 focus:border-brand-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-500/20 text-sm px-3 py-2 font-sans (Lora). Add INPUT_LABEL token: text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1.5 font-display. Add INPUT_HELPER: text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1. Add INPUT_ERROR: text-xs text-red-600 mt-1. Form labels use Poppins (font-display), input text uses Lora (font-sans). Focus ring is subtle brand-500/20. No slate or indigo references.
acceptanceCriteria: INPUT_BASE uses border-gray-300 and warm placeholder color
Focus ring is brand-500/20 (subtle)
INPUT_LABEL, INPUT_HELPER, INPUT_ERROR tokens added
Labels use font-display (Poppins), inputs use font-sans (Lora)
No slate-* or indigo-* references in form tokens
npm run build succeeds
userStories.notes: Forms are the primary interaction surface for auth pages and settings.

userStories.title: Update shadows and border-radius in tailwind.config.js
userStories.description: In tailwind.config.js theme.extend, update boxShadow: card becomes '0 1px 2px rgba(120,100,75,0.06)', card-hover becomes '0 2px 8px rgba(120,100,75,0.08)', modal becomes '0 20px 60px rgba(20,20,19,0.15)' (warm black using #141413). Remove glow shadow entirely. Update borderRadius: card '0.75rem' (12px), button '0.375rem' (6px), tag '9999px' (full). Shadows are warm-tinted and minimal; borders carry visual weight.
acceptanceCriteria: Shadow values use warm rgba tones, not cool grays
card shadow is very subtle (< 0.1 opacity)
glow shadow removed from config
button border-radius is 6px (0.375rem)
npm run build succeeds
userStories.notes: Complements US-219. Shadows should barely be noticeable.

userStories.title: Add nav and sidebar design tokens
userStories.description: Add new tokens to designTokens.js for navigation. NAV_CONTAINER: bg-white border-b border-border-default. NAV_LINK: text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-900 text-sm font-display font-medium transition-colors px-3 py-2 rounded-md. NAV_LINK_ACTIVE: text-gray-900 bg-surface-secondary text-sm font-display font-medium px-3 py-2 rounded-md. NAV_BRAND: text-gray-900 font-display font-semibold text-lg tracking-tight. No gradient backgrounds. Active state uses warm surface-secondary tint. Nav should feel minimal and recede behind content.
acceptanceCriteria: NAV_CONTAINER, NAV_LINK, NAV_LINK_ACTIVE, NAV_BRAND tokens added
Nav text uses font-display (Poppins)
No gradient or brand-colored backgrounds in nav tokens
Active state uses bg-surface-secondary tint
npm run build succeeds
userStories.notes: Navigation is persistent — must feel quiet and warm.

userStories.title: Add badge, tag, and status tokens
userStories.description: Add tokens to designTokens.js. BADGE_DEFAULT: bg-surface-secondary text-gray-600 text-xs font-display font-medium px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full. BADGE_SUCCESS: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-200 text-xs font-display font-medium px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full. BADGE_WARNING: bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border border-amber-200. BADGE_ERROR: bg-red-50 text-red-700 border border-red-200. BADGE_INFO: bg-blue-50 text-accent-blue border border-blue-200. TAG: bg-surface-secondary text-gray-600 text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full hover:bg-surface-tertiary. Pipeline statuses (Applied, Interview, Offer, Rejected) should map to these badge tokens.
acceptanceCriteria: BADGE_DEFAULT, BADGE_SUCCESS, BADGE_WARNING, BADGE_ERROR, BADGE_INFO tokens added
TAG token added with hover state
Badge backgrounds are muted pastels
All badges use font-display and rounded-full
npm run build succeeds
userStories.notes: Pipeline statuses are a core visual element — must look refined.

userStories.title: Clean up index.css for warm palette
userStories.description: In frontend/src/index.css, replace all hardcoded indigo/slate color values. Replace any #6366F1 with #d97757. Replace slate-* utilities with gray-* equivalents. Set body background to #faf9f5 (light) and #141413 (dark). Replace selection color with brand-500/20. Remove gradient background utilities from global styles. Ensure scrollbar styles use warm gray tones. Zero cool-tinted colors in the base stylesheet.
acceptanceCriteria: No #6366F1, indigo, or slate hex values in index.css
Body background is #faf9f5 in light mode
Dark mode background is #141413
Selection highlight uses brand-500/20
npm run build succeeds
userStories.notes: Catches stray cool colors in global styles that tokens don't cover.

userStories.title: Refine animations for calmer motion
userStories.description: In frontend/src/styles/animations.css, adjust for a calmer feel. fadeIn: 300ms ease-out (from 200ms). slideInRight/slideInUp: 6px translate (from 10px), 250ms duration. scaleIn: start from scale(0.97) (from 0.95). Remove pulse-dot if unused. Verify prefers-reduced-motion media query is preserved. Motion should be present but restrained — never bouncy.
acceptanceCriteria: fadeIn duration is 300ms
Slide animations use 6px translate distance
scaleIn starts from scale(0.97)
prefers-reduced-motion preserved
npm run build succeeds
userStories.notes: Low priority but contributes to the calm editorial feel.
